hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT distinct c.SourceCompanyId, c.id FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c , com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEvent as ce , com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs WHERE c.id = ce.Company.id AND c.id = cs.Company.id AND c.IAMRealmId IS NOT NULL AND ce.EventTypeCd IN ('FirstPayrollReceived', 'EntitlementStateChanged', 'EntitlementUnitAdded', 'EntitlementUnitStatusChanged', 'CustomerSignedUp', 'ServiceStatusChange') AND ce.EventTimeStamp between :lastProcessedTime and :batchStartTime
